title: Pick Of The Fringe With Pearl And Dean
description: Pick and Mix with Pearl and Dean will showcase some of the Fringe's finest, funniest and most fabulous acts all under one roof! Dip your hand into our pick and mix bag of Brighton's best, and enjoy this sweet treat at the Komedia. Which tasty morsel will be your favourite? A night that's sure to leave you wanting more... Line up subject to change

venue.name: Komedia Studio
venue.address: 44-47 Gardner Street, 44-46 Gardner Street, East Sussex
